creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Seems like this dependency changed for some reason:

===>  License APACHE20 accepted by the user
===>   grafana7-7.5.11 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> prometheus-prometheus-6f296594a852_GH0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://codeload.github.com/prometheus/prometheus/tar.gz/6f296594a852?dummy=/prometheus-prometheus-6f296594a852_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/prometheus/prometheus/tar.gz/6f296594a852?dummy=/prometheus-prometheus-6f296594a852_GH0.tar.gz: size unknown
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/prometheus/prometheus/tar.gz/6f296594a852?dummy=/prometheus-prometheus-6f296594a852_GH0.tar.gz: size of remote file is not known
prometheus-prometheus-6f296594a852_GH0.tar.gz           13 MB 6577 kBps    03s
=> Fetched file size mismatch (expected 13838137, actual 13838140)
=> Trying next site
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/prometheus-prometheus-6f296594a852_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/prometheus-prometheus-6f296594a852_GH0.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 13838137, actual 13838140
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.

(affects both main and 2021Q4 branches)

Can't see the error on package builders yet, they probably use cached copies of the offending file.
